deposit().notice: Deposits funds into the escrow. Can be called by anyone, and just once.

emergencyPayout(address,uint256).notice: Sends funds from the escrow to the receiver. Can be called only by the factory contract.

factory().notice: Returns the address of the factory contract.

feeRecipient().notice: Returns the address of the fee recipient.

payout().notice: Sends funds from the escrow to the receiver. Can be called only by the factory contract.

token().notice: Returns the address of the token contract.
